prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! I know this task seems daunting, but you're capable of handling it. Every minute you spend worrying is a minute you could be making progress. Take a deep breath, break it down into smaller steps, and just start. You'll feel so much better once you begin, and the sense of accomplishment will be worth it. Remember, you're stronger than the challenge in front of you. Now go crush this!
